content_of_post_to_comment: I truly think the dumbest people in the world are those who make others feel dumb. I can’t count how many people have tried to make me feel dumb in my life. It used to confuse me, I used to listen. But as time went on, I realised that other people, people who I respected, thought I was smart. I realised the people who thought I was dumb, were infact missing quite a few screws.
comment: A useful split is competence vs status behavior: making others feel dumb is often status play, but observers still misread it as competence, which distorts who gets trusted.
